title: Workspace Shipped Payload Audit
goal: Implement #460 by auditing root, planning, memory, and installed host-repo payloads against daily-operation necessity, then remove or route unnecessary shipped surfaces without weakening lifecycle operation.
non_goals: Do not remove useful daily-operation or required lifecycle surfaces.
Do not remove maintainer tooling from the source checkout.
Do not broaden code-generation extraction work beyond the audit and small obvious cleanup slices.

intent.outcome: A reviewer can see which package and installed payload surfaces are daily-operation required, lifecycle required, optional advanced feature, maintainer/development only, generated/proof-only, or obsolete.
intent.constraints: Keep host repos functional after install/adopt/upgrade and keep package-local tests authoritative for shipped payload boundaries.
intent.latitude: Remove or exclude obvious development/proof-only shipped surfaces when the change is small and well-covered; otherwise create follow-up issues.
intent.escalation: Escalate if a candidate removal has unclear runtime or migration impact.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #460, refresh external issue evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by refreshed planning state.
execution.proof: package build inventory tests, installer/workspace tests as touched, contract tooling, ruff, maintainer/planning surfaces, proof selector, doctor

invariants: Installed host repos are not forced to understand maintainer/development internals.
Runtime command adapters remain available where imported by package CLIs.
Audit residue stays compact and queryable rather than becoming ordinary startup input.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #467/#469/#471 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded. #472 was created as a shipped-footprint follow-up for optional memory routing-feedback payload.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #460 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: A compact shipped-payload audit now classifies root, planning, memory, and installed host-repo payload groups by daily-operation necessity, and memory packaging tests now assert the current-memory required baseline is empty.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: #472 tracks the optional routing-feedback calibration seed as a likely opt-in/source-only payload candidate.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote the next #450 child after external issue evidence refresh

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Audit shipped package payloads against daily-operation necessity.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep daily operation and lifecycle package behavior intact.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which surfaces are obvious development/proof-only payloads versus required lifecycle payloads.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A removal needs migration semantics or could break installed host repos.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Classify and shrink shipped/default footprint before adding capability.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this make ordinary installed and shipped package surfaces smaller or at least visibly justified?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Build artifact inventories and classify shipped/runtime-installed payload surfaces by necessity.
invariants: Installed host repos are not forced to understand maintainer/development internals.
Runtime command adapters remain available where imported by package CLIs.
Audit residue stays compact and queryable rather than becoming ordinary startup input.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q
uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

rg -n "REQUIRED_MANAGED_PATHS|required shipped current-memory|required current-memory|current-memory required|routing-feedback.md" packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py docs/reviews/shipped-package-payload-audit-2026-04-28.md packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py packages/memory/README.md packages/memory/bootstrap/README.md .agentic-workspace/memory/WORKFLOW.md

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-shipped-payload-audit.plan.json pyproject.toml packages/planning/pyproject.toml packages/memory/pyproject.toml tests packages/planning/tests packages/memory/tests docs .agentic-workspace/docs --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
completion_criteria: A compact audit lists shipped surfaces by necessity class.
Development/proof/codegen surfaces are not shipped unless runtime operation needs them.
Current-memory required payload expectations are removed or confirmed already routed through #455.
Unnecessary shipped surfaces have follow-up cleanup issues or implementation slices.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Added a compact shipped package payload audit, kept it as review evidence rather than startup input, and tightened memory packaging tests so current-memory has no required shipped baseline.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; rg -n "REQUIRED_MANAGED_PATHS|required shipped current-memory|required current-memory|current-memory required|routing-feedback.md" packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py docs/reviews/shipped-package-payload-audit-2026-04-28.md packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py packages/memory/README.md packages/memory/bootstrap/README.md .agentic-workspace/memory/WORKFLOW.md; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: docs/reviews/shipped-package-payload-audit-2026-04-28.md records classification, implemented slice, and follow-up candidates.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Memory packaging tests now encode that current-memory required baseline is empty; audit records routing-feedback as optional shipped-footprint follow-up.
execution_summary.resume from: refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child

execution_run.what happened: Classified shipped package and installed payload groups in a compact review artifact, created #472 for optional memory routing-feedback payload reduction, and changed memory packaging tests so current-memory routing-feedback is no longer asserted as required core payload.
execution_run.scope touched: active planning state, execplan closeout, shipped payload audit doc, memory packaging tests, and external issue creation.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Review evidence and tests changed; no runtime package behavior changed in this slice.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_packaging.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; rg -n "REQUIRED_MANAGED_PATHS|required shipped current-memory|required current-memory|current-memory required|routing-feedback.md" packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py docs/reviews/shipped-package-payload-audit-2026-04-28.md packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py packages/memory/README.md packages/memory/bootstrap/README.md .agentic-workspace/memory/WORKFLOW.md; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: This slice is ready to archive and #460 can close; parent #450 remains open.
execution_run.next step: Refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; the slice produced evidence and a small packaging-test correction without changing lifecycle behavior.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; shipped surfaces are classified by necessity, generated/proof-only boundaries are accounted for, and current-memory required payload expectations are explicitly empty.
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; the audit is review evidence/history and not ordinary startup input.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: medium; the routing-feedback file still ships as optional payload, so #472 carries the next implementation question.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: archive #460, close it, refresh evidence, and continue #450 through remaining children and #472 when prioritized.

proof_report.validation proof: All selected proof commands passed: packaging/workspace/contract tests, package-local memory installer tests and ruff, broader ruff, contract tooling check, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, proof selector, and planning/memory doctor.
